text_block_list.name: TV
text_block_list.text:
And so, young Umayama and Musunoumi
continue training deep into the night with the
future of their sumo stable firmly on their
shoulders...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Sigh... That was so moving! Dosukoi! The Youth of Sumo is such a good movie! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Trainer, thanks for letting us use your TV!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
What did you think of the movie, Biko? Didn't
Umayama and Musunoumi's rivalry get you fired
up?

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: All right, Bono! Come at me!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Charge at me with all your might!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: ...What?!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Don't hold back! Run at me and shove me as hard
as you can!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... I don't think that's a good idea. You might
get hurt.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
But I want to wrestle with you at full strength! I
wanna be like Umayama and Musunoumi!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
I wanna grow strong, just like how they grew big!
Lend me your strength, Bono!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Umm, I know you want to get stronger, but I'm
afraid I might send you flying through the roof if I
really charged into you...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Ngh?! I-I don't want that happening! Okay, then
let's compete in something that you don't have to
hold back in!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
How about we do an eating contest? We can
compete either in speed or quantity. I can do
both!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: An eating contest? That does sound safer...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: What do you think, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: An eating contest is safer, but I feel like changing the competition so much makes it lose its original intent. Still, I need to answer.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Okay! I'll get the food ready.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
They usually use hot dogs for speed eating
contests, but we don't have any, so let's use
yakisoba dogs!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
All right! First one to eat ten wins! I won't lose,
Biko!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, they start shoveling yakisoba dogs into
their mouths... And the winner is...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Wow, I won?

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Dang it! I was sure I could eat faster...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They both started off strong, but Hishi Akebono
got a second wind halfway through and chowed
her way quickly to victory!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Darn it! I can't even hold a candle against you
when it comes to eating!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Biko...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I think I only won because I have a big mouth,
and I was able to take bigger bites! ♪

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: ...Hm? It's true! You do have massive jaws!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Speaking of, I'm still a bit hungry.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: And you look pretty tasty, Biko!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: What?! N-no, I'm not! Don't eat meee!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh, come back here! Lemme season you with soy
sauce! ♪

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Knock that off, Bono! What do you think
you're—ahaha! T-tickling's no fair!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe! It's just a little trick to bring out the
flavor. Tickle, tickle! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The competition results go out the window, along
with peals of clear laughter from the two of them.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: YES! Victory is mine!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Congratulations, Biko! You were really fast!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono puts up a good fight, but Biko
Pegasus's tenacity wins out.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Speed eating is a specialty of mine! I've
been refining it for years!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: It'd be rude to eat while watching Carrot Ranger, you see...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
So I got into the habit of scarfing all my meals
down! My mom wasn't very happy about it,
though...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
You must really love Carrot Ranger! Speed eating
is your weapon! ☆

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
My weapon... Yes, that's it! Now, to hone it even
further!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I'll help by making lots and lots of yakisoba dogs
for you!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
You're always so reliable, Bono! You're just like
Dr. Veggie!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
All right, let's become the fastest speed eaters
who have ever lived!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Yeah! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't think they're on the same page, but
anyway... I warn them to chew their food
thoroughly and watch over their competition.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Okay! I'll get the food ready.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I made tons of meat buns, so eat as many as you'd
like.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Wow! They look steaming hot and delicious! Let's
get started!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They start shoveling meat buns into their
mouths... And the winner is...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: That was tasty! ☆ Whew, I'm stuffed!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: I-I can't eat another bite...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono claims an overwhelming victory
with her triple-bun devouring technique.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry, Bono!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: ...? About what?

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to have a pulse-pounding battle with
you, just like Umayama and Musunoumi... But I
failed you.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry I'm not good enough to be your rival!
Ugh, the shame!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Biko...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Then come back stronger and win next time,
Carrot Ranger!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
...! I know that line... It's from the episode where
Carrot Ranger faced off against her ultimate rival,
Cucumber Ranger!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
"Each time you battle me, I become stronger...
So, I say to you, Carrot Ranger!"

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
"Come and challenge me as many times as you'd
like, so long as the flame of justice burns in your
heart!"

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: I get it now...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Umayama and Musunoumi were Carrot Ranger
and Cucumber Ranger all along!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
They're really similar, right? But Biko, remember
this!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
You can challenge me again anytime. I'll always
be happy to take you on!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: ...I will! And next time, we'll settle this with rice!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end, Hishi Akebono's bond with Biko
Pegasus grows even stronger thanks to their little
competition.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
That's fifty-five! Trainer, another meat bun,
please! ♪

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: A-another one for me... too... Urgh.
choice_data_list: Competitors, put your meat buns down!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Yay, I won! Um, are you okay, Biko? Does your
tummy hurt?

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Thankfully, the match was called with my stomach
at 95% capacity, so I'll be fine...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
But I'm so mad at myself! I could've fit another
half a bun before reaching my limit!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Then how about we have dessert instead?

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I'm still hungry, so let's eat until we're both full!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Let me know if you have any requests, and I'll
make it for you! Oh! How does a whole bucket of
almond tofu sound?

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
B-Bono, please have mercy! I was just trying to
sound tough! I'm actually full to bursting!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Really? But I bet your dessert stomach's still
empty!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, their eating contest comes to a close,
with Hishi Akebono as the clear winner.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Mmm! ♪ They're so plump, fluffy, and tasty!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: You made these, Bono?! They sure are fluffy!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! ♪ Since I was already cooking, I decided to
steam some soup dumplings and shumai!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Would you like some?

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Ooh! Definitely! I'd be happy to help you out!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Everything was so delicious! Chinese food is so buono and flavorful! I love it!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! We sure ate a lot. I'm too full to get up...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Did you like them too, Trainer? What a nice,
fulfilling meal that was! ♪

text_block_list.name: Bono and Biko
text_block_list.text: Oh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...The two got so distracted by the food that they
completely forgot to keep score.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Huh?! But why?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm worried the two of them will lose themselves in
the heat of the moment and get hurt, but I don't
want to be rude and say it too bluntly.
choice_data_list:
Because you're already competing with each
other!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Ohhh! Okay!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: That sounds cool... But what do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Hm, I think Trainer is talking about our feelings.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
You want to grapple and wrestle with me with all
your might.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
And that's just like how everything started when
Umayama challenged Musunoumi.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Gasp! Does this mean what I think it means, then?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Uh-huh. It means you've already taken the first
step toward getting stronger, Biko.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: W-well, then!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Why don't we go for a run to see if it's
true?

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Sure thing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the competition is called off, and the two
of them instead head over to the track together.
